params.name: Oxus Treasure
params.description:
On Jan 26, 486 BC, the Oxus Treasure was included in the treasury by King Achaemenid.
The Oxus Treasure is a collection of more than 100 artifacts of precious metal, dated back to the Achaemenid Empire. A group of merchants first found this treasure, but while transporting it, they ran into robbers, who looted the treasure by force. Fortunately, the merchants caught wind of these robbers that they were selling the stolen goods. The merchants called in the garrison and eliminate the robbers. T …
